home.seoTitle: Juan Camilo Salazar | Full Stack Developer, AI & Web Specialist
home.seoDescription: Boost your business with advanced tech solutions. Modern web development with React/Next.js and AI Agents for sales automation and 24/7 customer engagement.
home.bio: Software developer passionate about technological innovation. Expert in building web and mobile applications using modern technologies like Next.js, React, Node.js, .NET and SQL databases. With experience on cloud platforms like Azure and AWS, I specialize in building scalable, secure and high-performance solutions.

home.highlight4Text: React Native, e-commerce, admin panels and automation
home.ctaText: Let's talk about how I can help you build quality software that makes a difference.
